'''shohafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphomaniac|nymphomaniac]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphomaniac|nymphomaniac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shohafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shohafithi|shohafithi]] || [[word:shohafiji|shohafiji]] || [[word:shohafishi|shohafishi]] || [[word:shohafiki|shohafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shohafuthuthu|shohafuthuthu]] || [[word:shohafujuju|shohafujuju]] || [[word:shohafushushu|shohafushushu]] || [[word:shohafukuku|shohafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shohafuthu|shohafuthu]] || [[word:shohafuju|shohafuju]] || [[word:shohafushu|shohafushu]] || [[word:shohafuku|shohafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shohafufthuf|shohafufthuf]] || [[word:shohafufjuf|shohafufjuf]] || [[word:shohafufshuf|shohafufshuf]] || [[word:shohafufkuf|shohafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shohafethe|shohafethe]] || [[word:shohafeje|shohafeje]] || [[word:shohafeshe|shohafeshe]] || [[word:shohafeke|shohafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shohafothotho|shohafothotho]] || [[word:shohafojojo|shohafojojo]] || [[word:shohafoshosho|shohafoshosho]] || [[word:shohafokoko|shohafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shohafotho|shohafotho]] || [[word:shohafojo|shohafojo]] || [[word:shohafosho|shohafosho]] || [[word:shohafoko|shohafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shohafofthof|shohafofthof]] || [[word:shohafofjof|shohafofjof]] || [[word:shohafofshof|shohafofshof]] || [[word:shohafofkof|shohafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shohafïfthïf|shohafïfthïf]] || [[word:shohafïfjïf|shohafïfjïf]] || [[word:shohafïfshïf|shohafïfshïf]] || [[word:shohafïfkïf|shohafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shohafïfthïfthïf|shohafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shohafïfjïfjïf|shohafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shohafïfshïfshïf|shohafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shohafïfkïfkïf|shohafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shohafïfthïf|shohafïfthïf]] || [[word:shohafïfjïf|shohafïfjïf]] || [[word:shohafïfshïf|shohafïfshïf]] || [[word:shohafïfkïf|shohafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shohafïfthïf|shohafïfthïf]] || [[word:shohafïfjïf|shohafïfjïf]] || [[word:shohafïfshïf|shohafïfshïf]] || [[word:shohafïfkïf|shohafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shohafæthæ|shohafæthæ]] || [[word:shohafæjæ|shohafæjæ]] || [[word:shohafæshæ|shohafæshæ]] || [[word:shohafækæ|shohafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shohafathatha|shohafathatha]] || [[word:shohafajaja|shohafajaja]] || [[word:shohafashasha|shohafashasha]] || [[word:shohafakaka|shohafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shohafatha|shohafatha]] || [[word:shohafaja|shohafaja]] || [[word:shohafasha|shohafasha]] || [[word:shohafaka|shohafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shohafafthaf|shohafafthaf]] || [[word:shohafafjaf|shohafafjaf]] || [[word:shohafafshaf|shohafafshaf]] || [[word:shohafafkaf|shohafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shohafasha|shohafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shohafshësha|shohafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shohafrosha|shohafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shohafmusha|shohafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shohafyasha|shohafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshohafnkshësha|goshohafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshohafnkrosha|goshohafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshohafnkmusha|goshohafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshohafnkyasha|goshohafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shohahafasha|shohahafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shohahafshësha|shohahafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shohahafrosha|shohahafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shohahafmusha|shohahafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shohahafyasha|shohahafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshohahafnkshësha|goshohahafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshohahafnkrosha|goshohahafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshohahafnkmusha|goshohahafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshohahafnkyasha|goshohahafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shehæfasha|shehæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shehæfshësha|shehæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shehæfrosha|shehæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shehæfmusha|shehæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shehæfyasha|shehæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshehæfnkshësha|goshehæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshehæfnkrosha|goshehæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshehæfnkmusha|goshehæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshehæfnkyasha|goshehæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shohfafasha|shohfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shohfafshësha|shohfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shohfafrosha|shohfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shohfafmusha|shohfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shohfafyasha|shohfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshohfafnkshësha|goshohfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshohfafnkrosha|goshohfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshohfafnkmusha|goshohfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshohfafnkyasha|goshohfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
